scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('www')) { fs.mkdirSync('www'); }; if (fs.existsSync('index.html')) { fs.copyFileSync('index.html', 'www/index.html'); console.log('Copied index.html to www/'); } else { console.log('Build directory verified.'); }"
scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (process.platform !== 'win32') { try { require('child_process').execSync('chmod +x android/gradlew'); console.log('Set executable permissions on gradlew'); } catch (e) { console.warn('Could not set permissions:', e.message); } }"
